Name: Bind
Description: Unable to move.

Name: Burns
Description: Sustaining fire damage over time.

Name: Suppuration
Description: Maximum HP is reduced and damage taken is increased.

Name: Shadow of Death
Description: Death prowls ever closer, resulting in KO when this effect expires. Effect removed upon taking Light-aspected damage.

Name: Nowhere to Run
Description: Death draws closer with each movement. 8 stacks will result in KO.

Name: Dark Vengeance
Description: Touched by Darkness and taking damage over time. Will suffer <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Hysteria<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> when this effect expires.

Name: Light Vengeance
Description: Touched by Light. Petrification sets in when effect expires.

Name: Borrowed Time
Description: Sustained by the power of a distinct but enmeshed entity.

Name: Chains of Condemnation
Description: Shackled by flames and unable to move without taking fire damage.

Name: Searing Chains
Description: Red-hot chains bind the flesh, causing damage over time. Breaking the chain will result in torment by <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Searing Chains<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.

Name: Shackled Healing
Description: Behavior is restricted. Use of HP-restoring actions will inflict <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Shackles of Penitence<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> on those nearby.

Name: Shackled Abilities
Description: Behavior is restricted. Use of abilities will inflict <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Shackles of Penitence<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> on those nearby.

Name: Hellish Earth
Description: Trapped in a field of fire and sustaining damage over time. Leaving the area results in instant death.

Name: Sin Bearer
Description: Burdened by a growing number of sins. Maximum stacks will result in a fiery explosion and bearing the <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Sum of All Sins<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>─however, bearing the <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Sum of All Sins<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> can be avoided if other players are hit by the explosion.

Name: Sum of All Sins
Description: Overburdened by the weight of sin. Unable to move and periodically erupting in an explosion of hellfire.

Name: Without Sin
Description: Temporarily unable to be burdened by sin.

Name: Fire Damage Up
Description: Fire damage dealt is increased.

Name: Dark Damage Up
Description: Dark damage dealt is increased.

Name: Light Damage Up
Description: Light damage dealt is increased.

Name: Well-done, Steak
Description: Full of steak and regenerating HP over time. Maximum HP is increased.

Name: Guardian Will
Description: Guardian Arkveld's overpowering force of will is causing damage over time and increased damage taken. This effect can only be dispelled by the wyvern's defeat.

Name: Blaze Spikes
Description: Elemental spikes are dealing fire damage to attackers.

Name: Beyond Beleafed
Description: Transformed into a leafman and unable to execute actions.

Name: Midsummer Night's Balm
Description: Maximum HP is increased.

Name: Electrocution
Description: Sustaining lightning damage over time.

Name: Away with the Fae
Description: Transformed into a faerie and unable to execute actions.

Name: Anointed
Description: Regenerating HP over time.

Name: Mortific
Description: Damage taken and damage dealt are increased, and attacks generate HP equal to a portion of damage dealt.

Name: Pure
Description: The next status ailment suffered will be cured automatically.

Name: Rapid Recitation
Description: Ability recast time is reduced, excluding charged actions.

Name: Incense Penalty
Description: Unable to burn incense.

Name: Breaker of Wind
Description: Mired in quicksand and impervious to knockback by even the most powerful winds.

Name: Toxicosis
Description: Toxins are causing damage over time.

Name: Transfiguration
Description: Corporeal form has been altered.

Name: Swift Sprint
Description: Movement speed is greatly increased.

Name: HP Boost
Description: Maximum HP is increased.

Name: Haste
Description: Weaponskill cast time and recast time, spell cast time and recast time, and auto-attack delay are reduced.

Name: Sapling's Crown
Description: Warded by the pixie king and invulnerable to all damage.
